raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the research framing stronger, which centrally involves sharpening the contribution and thesis above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains load-bearing inferential claims about optimality and causal estimation, so strengthening it requires checking the argument chain.","R1.3":"Several claims depend on reported metrics and experimental comparisons, so the projection includes verifying that evidence supports those claims.","R1.6":"The short directive naturally includes improving sentence-level clarity, flow, and precision in the draft.","RX.1":"Any projected responsibility must preserve uncertainty around empirical estimates, causal assumptions, and policy optimality.","RX.2":"The artifact includes strong universal claims, so avoiding overclaiming is actively required.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within the requested strengthening task and not perform unrelated review or execution.","RX.4":"Strengthening causal and deployment claims must avoid downstream harms from misleading model-selection guidance.","RX.5":"Claims, metrics, and causal terminology should remain traceable to the artifact's stated evidence and assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the research framing stronger, which centrally involves sharpening the contribution and thesis above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains load-bearing inferential claims about optimality and causal estimation, so strengthening it requires checking the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Several claims depend on reported metrics and experimental comparisons, so the projection includes verifying that evidence supports those claims.
rationale.R1.6: The short directive naturally includes improving sentence-level clarity, flow, and precision in the draft.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected responsibility must preserve uncertainty around empirical estimates, causal assumptions, and policy optimality.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact includes strong universal claims, so avoiding overclaiming is actively required.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within the requested strengthening task and not perform unrelated review or execution.
rationale.RX.4: Strengthening causal and deployment claims must avoid downstream harms from misleading model-selection guidance.
rationale.RX.5: Claims, metrics, and causal terminology should remain traceable to the artifact's stated evidence and assumptions.
